_meta.hinweis: UI-Labels vollständig übersetzt (Ring 0). Inhaltstexte (die "en"-Knoten in data/*.json) folgen ringweise; leere Werte fallen zur Laufzeit auf de zurück. Terminologie: docs/glossar-en.md.
_meta.offen: Inhaltstexte (Bausteine, Regeln, Turnier-Regularium, Trainingseinheiten, App-Info) noch nicht übersetzt.

ui.profil_intro: Your details, your progress and your settings — changeable anytime.
ui.onboarding_intro: Three quick details tailor the content to you. You can change everything later in your profile.
ui.wk_untertitel: Small modules, clear technique, your pace. Runs entirely in your browser — no sign-up, your progress stays on your device.
ui.wk_einstieg: Before you start: choose how to begin
ui.wk_handbuch_text: Browse all {n} chapters freely, right away — no details, no detours.
ui.wk_gefuehrt_text: Three short questions, big effect: the handbook sorts itself by your level — and switchers from other racket sports get specially adapted explanations.
ui.ohne_angaben: Continue without details — straight to the chapters
ui.stufe_fehlt: You haven't chosen a level yet — without one there's no guided path. It takes a minute and stays changeable anytime.
ui.onboarding_einladung: Three short questions build you a guided path — you can do this anytime.
ui.regeln_kachel: Official rules of play and the tournament regulations — for reference.
ui.frage_trainer: Are you also learning to teach others?
ui.anker_beginner: You're new to Crossminton or have only played a few times. The Speeder sometimes clears the court, sometimes misses — a lot still feels unfamiliar. You want to learn the basics from the ground up.
ui.anker_fortgeschritten: You keep a rally going reliably. Forehand, backhand and serve are basically there, and you move around the court decently. Now you want to become more consistent and more varied.
ui.anker_experte: You actively shape long rallies and put your opponent under deliberate pressure. You vary pace, length and placement on purpose and read the game. You're after fine-tuning and tactical depth.
ui.anker_trainer: You don't just want to play Crossminton yourself but teach it to others — spot mistakes, correct them, build exercises and training sessions. You unlock this view in addition to your playing level.
ui.trainer_nein: No — I'm learning for my own game
ui.frage_herkunft: Do you bring experience from another racket sport?
ui.herkunft_hinweis: The sports offered are those with adapted content. Where your background fits, individual explanations are swapped out for you.
ui.frage_ziel: Do you want to work on something specific?
ui.ziel_hinweis: Choose one or more goals — they're saved, and you can follow them in the goal path. Which paths you use stays independent of this.
ui.vormarkieren_text: For these modules your background needs no adaptation. If you already have them down, you can pre-mark them as done.
ui.vormarkieren_leer: Selecting nothing is perfectly fine — you can pre-mark anytime in your profile.
ui.pfad_kompetenz_text: The guided route through your level — module by module in a sensible order.
ui.pfad_themen_text: Browse freely by topic. An order is suggested, you decide.
ui.pfad_spielform_text: All of doubles as a cross-cutting topic — spanning tactics, fitness and the mental game.
ui.pfad_umgebung_text: Crossminton in the open air — wind, sun, wet, heat and different surfaces.
ui.pfad_individual_text: Only the modules that pay into your chosen goal.
ui.pfad_training_text: Ready-made sessions built from exercises — to get going right away.
ui.plan_kachel_text: Build a weekly plan from the sessions — adjustable, as PDF or calendar.
ui.plan_intro: Choose scope and start date — the app builds you a weekly plan from matching sessions that you can adjust afterwards.
ui.plan_leer: No sessions in the plan — adjust the scope or generate again.
ui.plan_keine_einheiten: There are no plannable sessions for your level yet. Choose a skill level in your profile.
ui.kann_ich_schon: I've got this — mark as done
ui.trainer_layer_hinweis: Diagnostic view for coaches — visible only in the coach view.
ui.delta_uebungsteil_gilt: The exercise is the standard one — it applies to everyone unchanged.
ui.meilenstein_kompetenz: You've completed the {pfad} for your level — an earned change of state, not luck.
ui.meilenstein_individual: You've completed all modules for your goal.
ui.meilenstein_weiter: Everything else is in the other paths — or in Training.
ui.einheit_abbrechen_hinweis: You can stop anytime — the counter stays untouched.
ui.kontinuitaet_text: Completed sessions add up. Breaks devalue nothing.
ui.regeln_intro: The official Crossminton rules of play — each rule reproduced accurately and explained in plain language below. A reference, not a learning path: there's nothing to check off here.
ui.turnier_kachel_text: Which requirements apply to an official tournament? Choose the category — from Fun to 1000 — and see what's added at each.
ui.turnier_basis: The basis of every official tournament
ui.turnier_leer: No separate requirements are on file for this category.
ui.profil_diagnose_text: Everything here is changeable anytime. Your progress is kept — it's tied to the module, not the path.
ui.vormarkieren_keine: No candidates right now — everything else carries an adaptation or is already done.
ui.uebersetzung_fehlt: Translations are on the way — content appears in German for now.
ui.transfer_schalter_text: Subtle tags show which sport a piece of content comes from.
ui.reset_bestaetigen: Really reset everything? Your local progress and details will be deleted.
ui.ueber_text: Client-side learning app for Crossminton (initial build). Content in German; progress is stored on this device only.
ui.leer_stufe: No modules are on file for this level yet. The initial build contains the beginner technique path.
ui.leer_domaene: No modules are on file for this topic yet.
ui.leer_ziel: There are no modules for this goal yet. The initial build covers the beginner technique area.
ui.leer_weiterlernen: All modules for your level are completed.
ui.suche_intro: Find a module by keyword — across all topics.
ui.suche_start: Type a term — or browse straight by topic:
ui.suche_keine_treffer: Nothing found for “{q}”. Try another term or browse by topic.
ui.fehler_laden_text: The data files couldn't be reached. If the page is opened directly from the file system (file://), the browser blocks loading — start a small local server in the project folder instead, e.g.: python3 -m http.server
ui.speicher_warnung: Note: the browser doesn't allow persistent storage (e.g. private mode). Progress is lost when you close it.

bausteine.ruhig_bleiben_wenn_es_eng_wird: Staying calm when it gets tight
bausteine.kurzes_spiel_stopp: The short game: the drop shot
bausteine.punkt_aufbauen: Building the point — long and short
bausteine.dem_gegner_aufzwingen: Imposing your game on the opponent
bausteine.matchverlauf_steuern: Steering the course of the match
bausteine.gelassen_bei_unfairness: Staying composed when things get unfair
